languages.text: {n}Лезвия на пальцах гемункула медленно удлиняются, издавая душераздирающий скрип, а его механические конечности начинают тянуться к вам.{/n} "Звуки, издаваемые тобой в процессе препарирования, доставляют мне удовольствие, мон-кай. Постарайся пережить процедуру, иначе я лишь зря потрачу время".

{n}The blades on his fingers slowly extend, emitting an ear-splitting screech, as his mechanical limbs start reaching for you.{/n} "The sounds you make during dissection please me, mon-keigh. Try to survive the procedure, otherwise I will have wasted my time."
languages.original_text: {n}Лезвия на пальцах гемункула медленно удлиняются, издавая душераздирающий скрип, а его механические конечности начинают тянуться к вам.{/n} "Звуки, издаваемые тобой в процессе препарирования, доставляют мне удовольствие, мон-кай. Постарайся пережить процедуру, иначе я лишь зря потрачу время".

traits.locale_text: {n}The blades on his fingers slowly extend emitting an ear-shredding screech, as his mechanical limbs start reaching toward you.{/n} "The sounds you make during dissection please me, mon-keigh. Try to survive the procedure, otherwise I will have wasted my time."

{n}The blades on his fingers slowly extend, emitting an ear-splitting screech, as his mechanical limbs start reaching for you.{/n} "The sounds you make during dissection please me, mon-keigh. Try to survive the procedure, otherwise I will have wasted my time."

languages.text: {n}Die Klingen an seinen Fingern fahren langsam aus, während seine mechanischen Gliedmaßen mit einem ohrenbetäubenden Kreischen nach dir greifen.{/n} "Die Geräusche, die Ihr während der Dissektion von Euch gebt, gefallen mir, Chem-Pan-Sey. Bitte versucht, die Prozedur zu überleben, sonst hätte ich meine Zeit vergeudet."
languages.original_text: {n}The blades on his fingers slowly extend, emitting an ear-splitting screech, as his mechanical limbs start reaching for you.{/n} "The sounds you make during dissection please me, mon-keigh. Try to survive the procedure, otherwise I will have wasted my time."

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Klingen an seinen Fingern fahren langsam aus, während seine mechanischen Gliedmaßen mit einem ohrenbetäubenden Kreischen nach dir greifen.{/n} "Die Geräusche, die Ihr während der Dissektion von Euch gebt, gefallen mir, Chem-Pan-Sey. Bitte versucht, die Prozedur zu überleben, sonst hätte ich meine Zeit vergeudet."

languages.text: {n}Lentement, dans un crissement assourdissant, il tend vers vous les lames qui ornent le bout de ses bras métalliques.{/n} « Les sons que vous émettez lors des dissections me plaisent énormément, mon-keigh. Mais tâchez de survivre à la procédure, je ne tiens pas à perdre mon temps. »
languages.original_text: {n}The blades on his fingers slowly extend, emitting an ear-splitting screech, as his mechanical limbs start reaching for you.{/n} "The sounds you make during dissection please me, mon-keigh. Try to survive the procedure, otherwise I will have wasted my time."

traits.locale_text: {n}Lentement, dans un crissement assourdissant, il tend vers vous les lames qui ornent le bout de ses bras métalliques.{/n} « Les sons que vous émettez lors des dissections me plaisent énormément, mon-keigh. Mais tâchez de survivre à la procédure, je ne tiens pas à perdre mon temps. »

languages.text: {n}Las cuchillas de sus dedos se extienden lentamente con un chirrido perforante mientras sus extremidades mecánicas se aproximan a ti.{/n} «Los sonidos que realizas durante la disección me complacen, mon-keigh. Intenta sobrevivir al procedimiento; no me gustaría haber malgastado el tiempo».
languages.original_text: {n}The blades on his fingers slowly extend, emitting an ear-splitting screech, as his mechanical limbs start reaching for you.{/n} "The sounds you make during dissection please me, mon-keigh. Try to survive the procedure, otherwise I will have wasted my time."

traits.locale_text: {n}Las cuchillas de sus dedos se extienden lentamente con un chirrido perforante mientras sus extremidades mecánicas se aproximan a ti.{/n} «Los sonidos que realizas durante la disección me complacen, mon-keigh. Intenta sobrevivir al procedimiento; no me gustaría haber malgastado el tiempo».

languages.text: {n}Mekanik uzuvları sana doğru uzanırken parmaklarındaki bıçaklar, kulakları sağır eden bir çığlık yayarak yavaşça uzuyor.{/n} "Dirikesim sırasında çıkardığın sesler hoşuma gidiyor mon-keigh. Prosedürden sağ çıkmaya çalış, vaktimi boşa harcamak istemem."
languages.original_text: {n}The blades on his fingers slowly extend, emitting an ear-splitting screech, as his mechanical limbs start reaching for you.{/n} "The sounds you make during dissection please me, mon-keigh. Try to survive the procedure, otherwise I will have wasted my time."

traits.locale_text: {n}Mekanik uzuvları sana doğru uzanırken parmaklarındaki bıçaklar, kulakları sağır eden bir çığlık yayarak yavaşça uzuyor.{/n} "Dirikesim sırasında çıkardığın sesler hoşuma gidiyor mon-keigh. Prosedürden sağ çıkmaya çalış, vaktimi boşa harcamak istemem."

languages.text: {n}他手指上的刀刃缓缓伸出，发出刺耳的尖啸，同时他的机械肢体朝你逼近。{/n}“你被解剖时发出的声音让我很享受，猴子。尽量挺过去吧，不然我可就白忙一场了。”
languages.original_text: {n}The blades on his fingers slowly extend, emitting an ear-splitting screech, as his mechanical limbs start reaching for you.{/n} "The sounds you make during dissection please me, mon-keigh. Try to survive the procedure, otherwise I will have wasted my time."

traits.locale_text: {n}他手指上的刀刃缓缓伸出，发出刺耳的尖啸，同时他的机械肢体朝你逼近。{/n}“你被解剖时发出的声音让我很享受，猴子。尽量挺过去吧，不然我可就白忙一场了。”

languages.text:
{n}指先から刃がゆっくりと伸び、機械的な肢体で近づいてくる。{/n}
「解剖中の君の叫び声は、私を喜ばせる。処置を生き延びるように。そうでなければ、私の時間は無駄になる。」
languages.original_text: {n}The blades on his fingers slowly extend, emitting an ear-splitting screech, as his mechanical limbs start reaching for you.{/n} "The sounds you make during dissection please me, mon-keigh. Try to survive the procedure, otherwise I will have wasted my time."

traits.locale_text:
{n}指先から刃がゆっくりと伸び、機械的な肢体で近づいてくる。{/n}
「解剖中の君の叫び声は、私を喜ばせる。処置を生き延びるように。そうでなければ、私の時間は無駄になる。」
